creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
The removal of Xwayland breaks firefox build with the error:
/usr/local/bin/clang++90 -o Unified_cpp_toolkit_xre0.o -c  -I/usr/ports/www/firefox/work/.build/dist/stl_wrappers -I/usr/ports/www/firefox/work/.build/dist/system_wrappers -include '-DTARGET_OS_ABI="FreeBSD_x86_64-gcc3"' -DGRE_MILESTONE=71.0 -DMOZ_APP_VERSION_DISPLAY=71.0 -DAPP_VERSION=71.0 '-DAPP_ID={ec8030f7-c20a-464f-9b0e-13a3a9e97384}' -DMOZ_BUILD_APP_IS_BROWSER -I/usr/local/include/harfbuzz -I/usr/local/include/cairo -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include/libdrm -D_THREAD_SAFE -pthread -Wno-error=shadow  -MD -MP -MF .deps/Unified_cpp_toolkit_xre0.o.pp   Unified_cpp_toolkit_xre0.cpp
In file included from Unified_cpp_toolkit_xre0.cpp:56:
/usr/ports/www/firefox/work/firefox-71.0/toolkit/xre/glxtest.cpp:39:10: fatal error: 
      'mozilla/widget/mozwayland.h' file not found
#include "mozilla/widget/mozwayland.h"

I find widget/gtk/mozwayland/mozwayland.h, but no mozilla/widget/mozwayland.h.
